entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `keystroke` TEXT NOT NULL, `character` TEXT NOT NULL, `frequency` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_dictionary_keystroke
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_dictionary_keystroke` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`keystroke`)

entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`keystroke` TEXT NOT NULL, `character` TEXT NOT NULL, content=`dictionary`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_dictionary_fts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `dictionary` BEGIN DELETE FROM `dictionary_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_dictionary_fts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `dictionary` BEGIN DELETE FROM `dictionary_fts` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_dictionary_fts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `dictionary` BEGIN INSERT INTO `dictionary_fts`(`docid`, `keystroke`, `character`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`keystroke`, NEW.`character`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_dictionary_fts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `dictionary` BEGIN INSERT INTO `dictionary_fts`(`docid`, `keystroke`, `character`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`keystroke`, NEW.`character`); END

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO room_master_table (id,identity_hash) VALUES(42, '3bf50d38786ec443bfceac2dae8ce941')
